name: Fake Remote Job with Bank Account Harvesting
description: Scammer posing as recruiter offering an unrealistically high-paying remote job to collect banking details

conversation.speaker: scammer
conversation.message: Hi, I found your profile and I have a $10,000/month remote job opportunity for you. No experience needed.

conversation.speaker: target
conversation.message: That sounds interesting. What is the role?

conversation.speaker: scammer
conversation.message: Just send me your bank account details so we can set up direct deposit for your first payment.
